help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Learn how to use AGBOT effectively
help.step1Desc: Take a photo of your plant leaf or upload an existing image from your device.
help.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes the image to detect pests and diseases in seconds.
help.step3Desc: Receive detailed treatment recommendations and prevention tips.
help.scanFeatureDesc: Use your camera or upload images to scan plants for pest damage and diseases.
help.describeFeatureDesc: Describe symptoms in text to get AI-powered diagnosis without an image.
help.historyFeatureDesc: Track all your past scans and monitor plant health over time.
help.exportFeatureDesc: Export your scan history in CSV or JSON format for record keeping.
help.themeFeatureDesc: Switch between light and dark themes for comfortable viewing.
help.langFeatureDesc: Available in English, Spanish, Hindi, and Swahili.
help.faq1Q: How accurate is the pest detection?
help.faq1A: AGBOT uses advanced AI trained on thousands of images, achieving over 94% accuracy in pest identification. Results improve continuously as the model learns from user feedback.
help.faq2A: Currently, AGBOT requires an internet connection for AI analysis. We are working on offline capabilities for future releases.
help.faq3Q: What types of pests can AGBOT detect?
help.faq3A: AGBOT can identify common agricultural pests including aphids, Japanese beetles, spider mites, cabbage worms, whiteflies, and many more. The database is continuously expanding.
help.faq4Q: How do I get the best scan results?
help.faq4A: For best results: 1) Use good lighting (natural daylight is best), 2) Focus on the damaged area of the leaf, 3) Hold the camera steady and close to the leaf, 4) Ensure the image is not blurry.
help.faq5A: Yes, your data is securely stored and never shared with third parties. You can export or delete your data at any time from the Settings page.
help.tip1: Scan leaves early in the morning when pests are most visible.
help.tip2: Check both top and bottom of leaves for complete assessment.
help.tip3: Regular scanning helps catch pest problems early.
help.tip4: Use the feedback feature to help improve AI accuracy.
help.tip5: Export your scan history regularly for farm records.
help.contactDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is here to help.
